analysis_result: MPNST-G1: 1/8 (12.5%); MPNST-G2: 5/7 (71.4%). Fisher p=0.0406. Matches paper.
discrepancy_analysis: Model-reproduced frequencies of NF1 mutations match the paper's reported values exactly (12.5% vs 71.4%), and the Fisher's exact p-value (p=0.0406) is consistent with the paper's reported 'p<0.05' significance. Within 10% relative concordance criterion.
